perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action footage. A middle-aged man wearing a newsboy cap and glasses is positioned in front of a purple-toned studio background, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. (2) A pink graphic banner titled '全民+1 政府相挺' regarding cash payouts appears at the bottom of the frame. (3) Various icons and cartoon illustrations appear around the man, including a thief character, social media logos (Facebook, Threads), and heart/furniture icons representing different scam themes. (4) The man continues talking while pointing to digital icons of a smartphone, a 'FOR SALE' sign on a sofa, and a crying girl character. (5) A large yellow-on-blue text overlay for '165反詐騙專線' appears at the bottom. (6) The video concludes with an illustration of an elderly couple to suggest protecting senior family members.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Background music starts with a medium-paced, upbeat electronic track. A male voice begins speaking Mandarin with a professional and urgent tone. (2) Audible sound effects like 'pops' and 'clicks' occur in synchronization with the appearance of on-screen graphics and icons. (3) The vocal delivery remains consistent and fast-paced, describing specific scam tactics used on social media platforms. (4) The music and vocals continue smoothly until the end of the clip, finishing with a clear concluding statement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional: '普發一萬' (10,000 cash for all) - Hook. (2) Warning: '成為最新的詐騙誘餌' (Becoming the latest scam bait). (3) Decorative: '一萬放大術' (10,000 amplification trick) - Hook. (4) Brand: 'facebook', 'threads' - Platform identifiers. (5) Functional: '165反詐騙專線' (165 Anti-Fraud Hotline) - Contact information. (6) Cautionary: '提高警覺' (Stay alert) - Emotional tone: Serious/Warning.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Description of Scam Tactics -> Official Warning & Hotline Info

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One male presenter is the only real person appearing on screen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a grey newsboy cap, black-rimmed glasses, a white t-shirt, and a wooden bead bracelet on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, purple-colored wall with soft studio lighting and a partially visible shelf in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting, very even and clear.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to raise public awareness about financial scams that exploit the topic of government cash payouts. It uses a trusted influencer persona to explain common deceptive tactics on social media and provides the official anti-fraud hotline to prevent viewers from falling victim.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The creator '3c Tim' uses his signature newsboy cap and glasses as a visual brand signature.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: High production value for a short warning video, utilizing many graphical overlays to maintain engagement during dense verbal information delivery.
